title: 🔗 MultiBoard Items 🔗 - Ensure that items are mirrored seamlessly in multiple board locations

posts.author: NikolaMastilovic (Nikola Mastilovic (SpicyTab))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone!

Nikola here from SpicyTab, and I’m thrilled to announce our brand-new app – MultiBoard Items! This app lets your items live across multiple boards simultaneously, and any changes you make will instantly sync everywhere!

With MultiBoard Items, you can set up truly unique and powerful workflows. Imagine having a “public” board for your customers and a “private” board for your internal team – with selected items effortlessly shared between both! Or, gather tasks from multiple boards into a single, centralized board for each team member - Any task assigned to that team member is sycned to his board. So convenient!

These are just some of the unique uscases that can be done with our app.

Plus, we’ve got automations covered! That means you can automatically link items to different boards based on the right conditions, making your processes smoother and more efficient.

Give it a whirl, and let us know what you think! We’re excited to hear your feedback.
